note: Pinned, fixed requirement checklist for ALL runs of this task. Authored once from the bundled task spec so requirement_coverage uses a constant denominator and is comparable across runs. Do not regenerate per-run.

requirements.requirement: POST /books creates a new book (title, author, year, isbn)
requirements.how_to_verify: A create route accepts the four fields and persists a book.
A list route returns the collection.
The list route filters by author query param.

requirements.requirement: GET /books/{id} returns a single book by id
requirements.how_to_verify: A get-by-id route returns one book (404 if absent).
An update route modifies an existing book.
A delete route removes a book.

requirements.requirement: Data stored in SQLite (or an embedded DB equivalent)
requirements.how_to_verify: Persistence uses SQLite/embedded DB, not just in-memory state.

requirements.requirement: Returns JSON responses with appropriate HTTP status codes
requirements.how_to_verify: Routes return JSON and correct codes (201/200/404/400 etc.).

requirements.requirement: Input validation: title and author are required

requirements.how_to_verify: A /health route returns a healthy status.

requirements.requirement: README.md with setup and run instructions
requirements.how_to_verify: README.md documents how to set up and run the service.
